fact: ED arrival rates vary strongly over the day; staffing should track time-of-day demand
use_in_project: Motivates hourly arrival profiles and shift-block staffing

fact: Queueing-based reallocation reduced LWBS despite only modest increase/reallocation of provider hours
use_in_project: Motivates staffing-shape experiments, not just total hours

fact: A&E staffing is a time-dependent queueing network problem with multiple resource types
use_in_project: Motivates why the future genome should include time blocks and possibly multiple roles

fact: DES + staffing optimization under budget can use LOS and urgent-patient constraints together
use_in_project: Motivates weighted fitness plus urgent-service fairness / case-based evaluation

fact: LOS is a widely used ED quality indicator influenced by patient and organizational factors
use_in_project: Motivates reporting time-in-system but being careful with scope wording

fact: Observed ESI distributions vary across hospitals; triage mix is not one-size-fits-all
use_in_project: Motivates caution if acuity classes are later introduced
